lines.lyrics: Lakdii kii kaathi kaathii ppeee ghodaa
lines.indian: Sa Sa Re Ga Pa: Ga Re | Sa. Re Ga Pa: Ga Re

lines.lyrics: Ghodaa dii dum peee joo maaraa hathoraa
lines.indian: Sa: Re Ga Pa: Ga Re Sa Re Ga Pa Pa:

lines.lyrics: Dhaudaa dhaudda dhaudaa dhaudda dum uthakee dauddaa
lines.indian: Dha Dha Dha Dha Pa Pa ma ma Ga Ga Re Re Sa Sa

lines.lyrics: Ghodaa phaunchaa chauk main chaukk main thaa naaii
lines.indian: Pa Pa Sa' Dha Dha Dha | Pa Pa Sa' Dha Dha

lines.lyrics: Ghodee jii kii naai nee hazaamat joo banaii
lines.indian: Pa Pa Pa Sa' Sa' Ni Ni Dha | Pa Dha Pa Ga ma Pa
